item.title: BCC Meeting: IKE Smart Kiosks + New Horizons + Fix the L8!
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Partners in Print , 402 Cedar St

We have a full house in April! IKE Smart Kiosks Jessica Burton and a representative from the Downtown Seattle Association will present plans for rolling out interactive wayfinding around Seattle for FIFA 2026 and beyond. New Horizons Ministries Tiffany Washington, Executive Director, will share their mission and social service efforts in Belltown. Fix the L8 Jason Li will talk about this grassroots initiative aimed at improving the reliability and speed of the 8 bus. Belltown is a dense neighborhood and frequent, reliable transit is critical. (Racing the 8: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cWiX

From Belltown Community Council

item.title: Earlybirds Club
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Earlybirds Club is a dance party designed for women, trans, and non-binary folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm because we have sh*t to do in the morning!At 2000s Night, were bringing peak Y2K energy: flip phones out, low-rise trauma healed, and the hits that defined a generation. From Britney to Beyonc, and from OutKast to Missy Elliott this is a scream-sing, drop-it-like-its-hot, why do I still know every word? situation.Earlybirds Club is more than a night out its a judgment-free, joy-forward space where kindness, good vibes, and sensible footwear rule. Come as you are (Juicy tracksuits welcome, comfy kicks encouraged) theres plenty of room on the dance floor for everyone.10% of ticket proceeds benefit Refugee Artisan Initiative, which partners with refugee and immigrant women to build skills, launch small businesses, and craft sustainable products that empower communities and protect our planet. Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events. This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. item.title: GRINDHAUS with Bosco, Naomi Smalls, Aja, King Molasses, & Special Guests
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 10:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

This May 1-2, join the action with another double-feature installment of Seattles best drag and performance art showcase. International woman of mystery, showgirl, producer, and star of RuPauls Drag Race All Stars 10, Bosco, invites you into a world of drag excellence. You know the name, you know the number... Welcome to GRINDHAUS.Joined by Drag Race legends Naomi Smalls (RPDR S8, AS4) and Aja (RPDR S9, AS3, AS10), and Drag King royalty King Molasses (Winner of RevryTVs King of Drag S1), plus a dynamite cast of Seattle stars...Our hometown heroine, Bosco, presents two nights of electrifying stunts, explosive glamour, and high-octane thrills. The world is not enough, but Seattle is!Merging the raw excitement and hilarity of classic Drag revues, the glamour of burlesque and cabaret shows, and a bit of performance art for your nerves, GRINDHAUS is an unforgettable experience with your host Bosco at the wheel.Line Up:BoscoNaomi SmallsAjaKing MolassesCali ColbyClara VoyanceMiss Texas 1988 This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. item.description:

item.title: Maye & Ambar Lucid
item.description:
Sunday, May 3, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Entre Dos Mundos brings together maye and Ambar Lucid for a tour rooted in duality; not just sonically, but also emotionally. Together, they create a space that feels both intimate and expansive, where softness, healing, and self-expression take center stage.Framed as a space to unmask and reconnect, the tour leans into themes of vulnerability and the divine feminine, inviting audiences to tap into a more instinctive and emotional side of themselves. While maye and Ambar come from distinct artistic worlds, their contrast is what defines the experience: two energies in conversation, balancing light and shadow in real time. All sales are final. item.title: SIr Woman - Spring Tour 2026 w/ Oh He Dead and Uncle Roy & Spice
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Were bringing the magic back. Sir Woman heads out in Spring 2026 with a full band for a run of shows built around feel, groove, and real-time energy.Fronted by Kelsey Wilson - co-founder of Wild Child and member of Glorietta - Sir Woman blends gospel-influenced soul, Rs warm, physical, and alive. The full band brings weight and swing, creating shows that feel loose but intentional, intimate but loud.Praised by NPR as a brave new R Sir Womans live performances are about being in the room when it happens - when the band hits, the groove settles in, and the night takes on a life of its own. item.title: Qveen Herby - Isle of Qveen Tour
item.description:
Friday, May 29, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Moore Theatre, 1932 2nd Ave, Seattle, WA

The Moore Theatre is located at 1932 2nd Avenue in Downtown Seattle. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Moore Theatre

item.title: Waku Waku: Anime Rave
item.description:
Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 10 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Dive head first into a high-energy, anime-inspired Rave as WAKU WAKU makes its Seattle debut on Saturday, May 30th, 2026DJ Jak Syn will be throwing down a steady supply of Anime-adjacent jams. Expect to find yourself dancing to a mix of kawaii bass, nightcore, synthwave, future funk, chiptune, EDM remixes & more.Cosplay Highly Encouraged!!!Cosplayers, anime fans, and nightlifers alike, join us in a space where expressive outfits, character-inspired looks, and shared fandom take center stage, whether youre serving main-character energy, chaotic sidekick vibes, or something entirely your own.This is a party for fans of anime themes, cosplay, and artists such as Pegboard Nerds, TeddyLoid, Bemax, Moe Shop, Caramella Girls, Kensuke Ushio, S3RL, Needy Girl Overdose, Geoxor, Ghost Data, Steradlye, and many more. item.title: Bingo Loco presents Name That Song
item.description:
Friday, June 5, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Bingo Loco is an interactive stage show which takes the concept of bingo and switches it on its head by turning it into an immersive party that has everyone dancing on tables coupled with lots of booze. The show features hilarious comedian hosts that will have you on the floor laughing, DJs playing the best of 90s/00 music, incredible prizes ranging from international holidays to musical instruments or even the odd dildo, mountains of confetti showers, on stage dance offs, immersive light shows, rave rounds that has everyone on the tables dancing and lots more madness you just cant predict all jammed in between 3 games of Name That Song Bingo! We can guarantee you have never been to an event like this before This event is 21 and over.
